calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Laura Neacato Respondent/Plaintiff appearing on her own behalf with witness
Nick Reckas Esq., for Appellant/Defendant Charlotte Sonoda who is not present.

This cause comes on this day for closing arugments by Respondent/Plaintiff Laura Neacato and Nick Reckas Esq., counsel for Appellant/Defendant Charlotte Sonoda.

All parties were previoulsy sworn.

Laura Neacato Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on her own behalf. The following documents are introduced into evidence:

Exhibit-7 Email Group Dated from Feb-21-14 to Jul-1-15

Nick Reckas Esq., counsel for Appellant/Defendant examines the Plaintiff Ms. Neacato on behalf of the Appellant/Defendant. The following documents are introduced into evidence:

Exhibit-C Email from Charkotte Sonoda

At the Conclustion of the hearing, The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: L. O'Mally Taylor; Clerk: J.Murphy; No reported. (611)

At the Conclustion of the hearing, The matter is taken under submission.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2015 Set For Trial On Jun-04-15 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 611

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-04-2015 Continued To Jun-04-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-04-2015 Continued To Jun-08-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 611
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Laura Neacato Respondent/Plaintiff appearing on her own behalf with witness
Nick Reckas Esq., for Appellant/Defendant Charlotte Sonoda who is not present.

This cause comes on regualry for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Laura Neacato Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on her own behalf. The following documents are introduced into evidence:

Exhibit-1 Tenancy Lease Agreement
Exhibit-2 Cashiers Check of Security Deposit
Exhibit-3 30 Day Notice Intent to vacate
Exhibit-4 Certified mail Receipt of 30 Day Notice
Exhibit-5 Notification of Move-out by emial dated 10/10/14
Exhibit-6 Request for Return of Security Deposit by email dated 11/01/14

Nick Reckas Esq., counsel for Appellant/Defendant examines the Plaintiff Ms. Neacato on behalf of the Appellant/Defendant. The following documents are introduced into evidence:

Exhibit-A Appellant's Declaration
Exhibit-B1 Hazard Notice
Exhibit-B2 Service Report

Judge: L. O'Mally Taylor; Clerk: J.Murphy; No reported. (611)

This matter is continued to Monday June 8, 2015 at 9:00am for closing arguments.
